response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 'Bittersweet Decoration' from on-screen text in the first segment. 2. Identified song 'Deal with the devil' from on-screen text in the second segment. 3. Researched 'ビターチョコデコレーション syudou' and 'Deal with the devil Tia'. 4. Found official lyrics for both songs. 5. Segmented the video into three parts (Song 1, Interlude, Song 2) based on content changes. 6. Constructed the JSON object with the gathered information.
response.global_summary: This video features a VTuber performance by Aki Rosenthal as part of her 'Aki-Rose Birthday Celebration 2026'. The performance includes vocal songs 'Bittersweet Decoration' (by syudou) and 'Deal with the devil' (by Tia), interspersed with a short talk segment featuring a die-rolling game.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Don't trust people too much
Don't love, don't expect anything
But don't be prickly either
Don't put on airs, don't stand out
Don't hurt anyone
Don't bully, don't kill
But don't let your hypocrisy show either
Don't be arrogant
Don't forget the light jokes and lip service
Always smile and show charm
Bitter chocolate decoration
Eat up without saying anything
Bitter chocolate decoration
You have to correct your 'don't like it because I haven't tried it'
After your head is empty, if the heart that remains is real
Then you must be the same

Did we meet somewhere the other day?... Ah, never mind'
Don't expose your ego in vain
Don't speak, don't understand
But definitely don't keep your mouth shut either
Rather than making people laugh, try to be the one laughed at
Try to respect people properly
Try to worship them, praise them
But never let it sound sarcastic
Don't mess around

And you say 'yes sir, yes sir' again

scenes.description: Interlude segment where the performer interacts with a die in a game set up on stage. No vocal music is playing.
The performer sings 'Deal with the devil' in a different stage outfit, a light green and white ensemble. The scene features on-screen text 'Deal with the devil'.
